target: It's about time... The time when Toki-chan came last loop.
(I can't sense the presence of Shadows...)
(But this awful feeling that makes my skin crawl feels like it's getting stronger and stronger...)
They're heading your way. They've brought a bunch of islanders' Shadows with them.

There are a lot of enemies!
They're coming this way!
I'm all set too! I'm gonna go all out!
Hello, Shinpei-kun. Sorry to keep you waiting. I was gathering everyone, so I ended up being late.
Hehe. Aren't you a little short on members over there?
You guys, what did you do to Toki-chan—
Shinpei!! One of them is coming from behind Shide!
(The wound is healing...! So that Toki-chan really is...)
What a greeting. I was planning on greeting Shinpei-san and the others myself.
(Damn it! While I was distracted by Toki-chan...!)
That hunter is hiding, huh. Ugh, and after I went through the trouble of bringing everyone...
What a fascinating display of skill.
Jeez, that was dangerous, wasn't it? Haine almost got hurt, you know?
(He blocked the bullet with a manhole cover as a shield...! Shide really has no openings.)
So there was someone hiding over there too.
Is it okay to be looking away?
Shinpei, the operation is a go! Hurry and hold on to me!
Are those two trying to run away!?
We're making a run for it!!
Shinpei, how many are following us!?
Mio and Toki-chan, two of them!
Perfect! Then let's head to that place!
Shinpei, we've arrived at the gym!
Sou, Mio!! The Shadows are chasing us!
So she is here, Tokiko's Shadow...!
Come on then! I'll catch you even if it kills me!!
I know! I'm counting on you to handle Shadow Mio-chan!
Dangerous...! You shouldn't be swinging a kitchen knife around!
What the heck! This hair is so annoying!
(With Ushio's hair attack, Mio dropped the knife...!)
Isn't that a nail gun? You're really ruthless.
Shin-chan, do you want to get in my way that badly?
Your back is wide open, Shinpei-san.
You're in the way. I need to get to Shinpei-san—
A lighter and hairspray! It's a flamethrower passed down directly from Sou-kun!
Why is Mio even here anyway!? You should have just stayed back!
To catch you, Tokiko! I definitely won't let you get away!
...Move aside, Mio. I have business with Ushio-san and Shinpei-san.
You're kidding me! You dodged all of that!?
Both you and Shinpei-san are the worst!
No matter what you say, our resolve won't waver!
I'll catch you and make you spit out where the real Tokiko is!
My older brother is so carefree. Always, always...
Always, always, always, always! Get out of the way right now, or I'll seriously crush you!
Mio-chan, step back! Something's coming out!
(Those are the <color=#GF_TIPS_039>Shadows that captured Ushio</color> in the Hiruko Cave!)
(This is bad! I have to save them!)
Weren't you the one who wanted to fight me? You shouldn't be so indecisive!!
Shinpei, Ushio! Leave Tokiko to me!
Are you sure it's okay to say that?

Don't underestimate me!
I can take down those Stray Shadows alone!
Mio-chan, hide behind me! If you take a hit like that head-on—
But even if you're strong, your movements are a bit slow!
I'm just making them hold back. To think you don't even understand that...
You really are an idiot, older brother.
Were you the one who had Shinpei-san and the others investigate the Hishigata Clinic, older brother?
You're really an idiot. You were supposed to be saved too, older brother. I made them promise...
I don't care about you anymore, older brother. Mio... I will protect Mio, no matter what!
Huh, what are you talking about…?
Don't be fooled, Mio-chan! She's just saying that to try and confuse us...!
These Shadows are all being controlled by telepathy!
Older brother, aren't you misunderstanding something? I'm satisfied with what I'm doing. Becoming a Shadow was my own choice too.
Wh-What are you saying!? There's no way that's true!!
Th-That's a lie! You're being forced to say all that, aren't you!?
It's not a lie, Mio. I made this decision of my own free will.
By my own will, the human me has died.
Ugh, the Shadow acted as a shield...!
It's better not to provoke him. Gil is short-tempered.
Tokiko being dead is a lie!! Then what about that phone call from earlier!?
That was me. I was already a Shadow back then.
Whether I'm human or not, it doesn't really make a difference.
Everyone thinks of that Ushio-san as the real Ushio-san, right?
If that's the case, then I'm the same, right? ...Aren't I?
No matter how I look at it, you only look like Tokiko to me.
What's with this all of a sudden?

I'm sorry, Tokiko.
I really am. I'm sorry!
It's my fault! Even though I'm your older brother... I didn't know anything about our family!
You were trying so hard to protect Mom. Isn't that right!?
Why do you know... about that...
Yeah, I know. That Mom is a Shadow.
You and Dad have been cooperating with them to keep Mom alive, right?
Who did you hear that from? From Shinpei-san?
No... You said it all yourself. Inside Ushio's memories.
Every time Shinpei dies, time loops, and he returns to a time just before he dies. Together with Ushio.
Ushio is able to show the memories of what she's seen and heard during those loops to people other than herself.
Someone dying, or being killed... Or not being able to do anything about it...
In the memories Ushio showed me, I learned a lot of facts. That's how I figured it out...
Tokiko, you're being used by the Shadows!!
But... you can still change that now! Shinpei has the power to change the future!!
Sh-Shut up! Don't complain about my decision!
Tokiko... stop it already! Haine intends to betray you!
There's still time! Let's fight together!
There's no way I'd be betrayed! Then why did I...!
Look at that. Sou-kun's in a pinch. He's about to be crushed!
Shinpei, I'll hold them off here! You go help Sou and Mio!
Look, look at that! Do you really think Sou-kun can win like that?
(Shadow Mio is in the way, so I can't help Sou!)
(Even if I shoot the nail gun from here, it probably won't reach...!)
(At least I can call out to Sou...!)
Damn it, rolling around to escape...! My body can't keep up at all!
No, it's no good! Not enough of them hit!
Are they really this fast when they get serious!?
